# Aloomii

> Forward Deployed AI for relationship-driven business. Aloomii embeds with your team, ships the AI system, and operates it alongside you until it is actually running your workflow. Founded and run by two formally trained software engineers with backgrounds at IBM, JP Morgan, and the Ontario Government. Based in Caledonia, Ontario, serving the Greater Toronto Area and the Golden Horseshoe.

Aloomii builds and operates Agentic Micro Companies (AMCs): businesses run by tiny teams with a shared Company Brain and fleets of AI agents handling the operational work, while humans handle judgment and relationships. Aloomii works on top of existing CRMs such as Salesforce, HubSpot, Attio, Wealthbox, and Bullhorn, and specializes in relationship-driven businesses where the next contract depends on the last conversation. The engagement model runs in four stages: diagnose (The Audit), amplify your voice (Studio), get into market (The Table), and install the Company Brain (Relationship Intelligence).

## Core pages
- [Home](https://aloomii.com/): What Aloomii does, who it serves, and the four-stage engagement model.
- [The Table](https://aloomii.com/table): A 90-day founder-led go-to-market engagement that keeps your voice in market and delivers 12 qualified conversations in 90 days.
- [Studio](https://aloomii.com/studio/): Podcast and short-form video production powered by Velocity, an AI content multiplication engine, optimized for AI search visibility.
- [The Aloomii Playbook](https://aloomii.com/playbook): Three editions (Founder, Solopreneur, Operator Leader) on running an Agentic Micro Company.
- [GTM Audit](https://aloomii.com/gtm-audit/): A free two-minute self-assessment that scores what is broken in your go-to-market and what to fix first.

## Services
- [The Audit](https://aloomii.com/#offerings): A 1,199 dollar one-time process-mapping diagnosis that identifies the three to five workflows burning the most time and the order to automate them.
- [Studio and Velocity](https://aloomii.com/studio/): Three tiers. Clips at 699 dollars per month, Show at 1,299 dollars per month, Velocity Pro at 1,899 dollars per month.
- [Relationship Intelligence](https://aloomii.com/#offerings): The Company Brain installed on your existing CRM. Three tiers. Foundation at 3,500 dollars per month, Operator at 6,500 dollars per month, Enterprise at 9,500 dollars per month.
- AI Search Visibility (AEO and GEO): Making relationship-driven and local businesses the answer that AI engines recommend.

## Articles
- [The Client You're About to Lose](https://aloomii.com/blog/the-client-youre-about-to-lose/): How to read the early silence signals that precede client churn.
- [What Is a Fractional GTM Team](https://aloomii.com/blog/fractional-gtm-team-startups-what-it-actually-costs/): What a fractional GTM team does, what it costs, and how it compares to a hire or an agency.
- [Business Development 2.0: The AI Agent Manager](https://aloomii.com/blog/bus-dev-2-0/): How the business development role evolves into managing a fleet of AI agents.

## About
- [Team](https://aloomii.com/#team): Yohann Calpu, Co-Founder, Strategy and Judgment. Jenny Calpu, Co-Founder, Creative Director. Both are trained software engineers with more than 15 years shipping production systems.
- [Pale Blue Nexus](https://palebluenexus.com): Aloomii's flagship podcast. Episode 1 features billionaire investor Jim Rogers.

## Machine-readable
- [Agent Card](https://aloomii.com/.well-known/agent-card.json): Structured JSON manifest for AI procurement agents. Contains capabilities, pricing, compliance, and interaction endpoints.

## Contact
- [Start a Conversation](https://aloomii.com/#contact): Discovery call request form.
